\tzpentry{ID3836}{Gyromagnetic Mode Frequency Definition}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3836 introduces Gyromagnetic Mode Frequency Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
\(\omega[\Psi_, T\Psi_] := Module[{q, p, dq, dp}, q = {r_cm, g}; p = {p_cm, L_gyro}; (* Translational part *) \omega = Sum[\mathrm{d}p[[i]] \[Wedge] \mathrm{d}q[[i]], {i, 1, 3}] + Sum[\[Epsilon]^{i j k} L_j\, \mathrm{d}\omega_k \[Wedge] \mathrm{d}\omega_i, {i,1,3},{j,1,3},{k,1,3}]; \omega ]\)
\]
